properties: Oxymeris nianga, also known as the nianga tree or the black-bean tree, is found in tropical regions and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties. Its therapeutic properties are mainly associated with its ability to lower blood pressure and act as a diuretic. The bark and roots of the tree are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The extracts from the tree have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing oxidative stress and inflammation. Further research is needed to fully understand the therapeutic potential of Oxymeris nianga.
